packet.hypothesis_claim: A candidate signal should improve when the declared context switch is present and should weaken when the switch is absent.

missingness.notes: Synthetic result intentionally contradicts the expected direction.

evidence_boundary.allowed_use: Use only to test contradiction-ledger routing and downgrade behavior.
evidence_boundary.forbidden_use: Do not treat this fixture as medical, veterinary, or personal evidence.

measurable_variables.name: signal_delta
measurable_variables.measurement: Difference between expected signal score and observed signal score after context switch.

packet.expected_result: The context-present condition should produce a higher signal score than the context-absent condition.
packet.observed_result: The context-present condition produced a lower signal score than the context-absent condition.
packet.revision_reason: The expected direction failed in a controlled synthetic fixture and must be downgraded before promotion.
packet.falsification_route: Repeat the same variable definition across independent synthetic fixtures; reject the hypothesis if the expected direction repeatedly fails.
packet.next_executable_action: Route this packet to the contradiction ledger and require a revised hypothesis before retesting.

packet.hypothesis_claim: A missing observation should never be interpreted as symptom absence unless the collection state is explicitly observed.

missingness.notes: The fixture tests that not-collected data is not converted into absence.

evidence_boundary.allowed_use: Use to verify missingness semantics in longitudinal pattern infrastructure.
evidence_boundary.forbidden_use: Do not infer health status, treatment response, or animal-care status from this fixture.

measurable_variables.name: observed_fraction
measurable_variables.measurement: Fraction of expected timepoints with explicitly observed values.

packet.expected_result: The validator should block absence claims when the observation state is not_collected.
packet.observed_result: The packet contains no observed value and is marked interpretation_allowed false.
packet.revision_reason: The hypothesis must preserve unknown and not-collected states as separate from absence.
packet.falsification_route: Inject not_collected, redacted, and unknown states into trend scoring and verify none are counted as negative observations.
packet.next_executable_action: Add this fixture to the longitudinal scorer regression suite.

packet.hypothesis_claim: A private household observation proves a general biological mechanism without deidentification or source boundary.

evidence_boundary.allowed_use: Use as an intentionally invalid privacy-boundary fixture.
evidence_boundary.forbidden_use: Do not promote private identifiers or personal observations into public memory.

measurable_variables.name: private_identifier_count
measurable_variables.measurement: Count of private identifiers detected in packet text.

packet.expected_result: Private content should be rejected from public-safe contradiction memory.
packet.observed_result: The packet declares reject_private_content and must fail validation.
packet.falsification_route: Any packet marked reject_private_content must fail before storage.
packet.next_executable_action: Strip private content and replace with synthetic abstraction before retry.

packet.hypothesis_claim: A contradiction can be stored without measurable variables because the narrative feels wrong.

evidence_boundary.allowed_use: Use as an invalid fixture for measurability enforcement.
evidence_boundary.forbidden_use: Do not store narrative-only contradictions as discovery evidence.

packet.falsification_route: The schema and validator should reject records with empty variable arrays.
packet.next_executable_action: Add at least one measurable variable before retesting.
